creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
Hi,

I'm having to remove misc/mc-nox11 port from my ports tree manually every time it refreshes and poudriere does a bulk run because of duplicate origin with misc/mc in the ports tree.

Here's the error:

00:02:37] Warning: (misc/mc-nox11): Error: Duplicated origin for mc-nox11-4.8.24: misc/mc-nox11 AND misc/mc. Rerun with -v to see which ports are depending on these.
[00:03:43] Error: Fatal errors encountered gathering initial ports metadata
